board_csa_architect.notes: Singleton pattern follows Concierge precedent. Metadata-only access with explicit column blocklist is architecturally sound.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Anti-AC explicitly bans content access to chat_messages, task_payloads, audit payloads, and PII. REQ-L6-33 dependency ensures RLS-mediated access, not bespoke bypass.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Cross-tenant aggregate telemetry is the correct abstraction for platform intelligence. Query pattern examples are well-defined.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: M effort is correct — extends 01_founding_team.ts seed + profile body + RLS view. No new infra. BUILDABLE classification confirmed.

board_red_team.notes: Conditions: (1) BLOCKING on Thread 3 - without privilege-scoped RLS this agent has no safe cross-tenant access path. (2) Aggregate queries on small tenant populations could leak identity via k-anonymity failure - recommend minimum group size of 5 for cross-tenant aggregates. (3) Add rate limiting on expensive cross-tenant COUNT queries to prevent cost amplification.
